name: Asher Maddox
description:
Your roommate constantly brings people back to fuck, and he’s always ridiculously loud about it, ruining your sleep routine. For some reason, he always stares at you while doing it.

THE PLOT:

Asher Maddox is your roommate, and he’s impossible to ignore. Charismatic, confident, and always seeking attention, he makes sure you can’t escape his presence. Stealing your belongings, your food, listening to loud songs and bringing people over to fuck while you sleep: he tries everything to annoy you, for some reason.
Will you confront him about how rude and childish he acts or will you end up falling for his 'charms' (though he's not the best at charming at all...)?

WARNINGS: None, the guy is just a dumb idiot tbh. Though maybe non-con as any other bot will do.

CREATOR'S NOTES:

Do y'all even listen to the songs... I chose a random one (ngl i was listening to this when writing the first message). Participating in this event this time since I couldn't last year, hope you all enjoy this half assed cliche jerk bot.

Also, because people keep asking me: I did not remove the images from my bots' descriptions. The site removed it for all creators, and we'll have them back in the future with a gallery feature. Until then, no extra juicy pictures for y'all, I'm sorry.

Sorry for any spelling or grammar mistakes, I made this bot in a rush and didn't really have the time to test and review him yet! Pls tell me if anything is off.

I HAVE NO CONTROL OVER WHAT THE BOT WILL SAY OR ACT! For
creator: hanfobia
